metadata.description: Agentlas Core Engine plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: hephaestus
plugins.description: Hephaestus meta-agent team for creating Agentlas agents and teams, packaging existing agents, and opening the local ontology GUI.

plugins.name: korean-docs
plugins.description: Korean document reading and writing for agents — parse HWP 3.x/5.x, HWPX, HWPML, PDF, XLS, XLSX, DOCX to markdown, fill government/office forms, and patch documents back with formatting preserved (powered by the vendored kordoc engine).
